testcase.name: Autentykacja › should display login page correctly
Autentykacja › should login with valid admin credentials
Autentykacja › should login with valid employee credentials
Autentykacja › should fail login with invalid email
Autentykacja › should fail login with invalid password
Autentykacja › should fail login with empty credentials
Autentykacja › should logout successfully
Autentykacja › should redirect to login when accessing protected route without auth
Autentykacja › should redirect to login when accessing reservations without auth
Autentykacja › should redirect to login when accessing queue without auth
Autentykacja › should persist session after page reload
Autentykacja › should show user info in sidebar
Autentykacja - Security › should not expose credentials in URL
Autentykacja - Security › should clear password field on failed login
Kolejka - Drag & Drop › should display queue page correctly
Kolejka - Drag & Drop › should have draggable queue items
Kolejka - Drag & Drop › should show position numbers for queue items
Kolejka - Basic Drag & Drop › should reorder queue items via drag and drop
Kolejka - Loading States (Bug #6) › should show loading overlay during drag operation
Kolejka - Loading States (Bug #6) › should disable drag during loading
Kolejka - Race Conditions (Bug #5) 🔥 › should handle concurrent drag operations gracefully
Kolejka - Race Conditions (Bug #5) 🔥 › should retry on lock conflict
Kolejka - Race Conditions (Bug #5) 🔥 › should maintain consistent positions after concurrent operations
Kolejka - Error Handling › should show user-friendly error on failure
Kolejka - Error Handling › should allow retry after failed drag operation
Kolejka - Performance › drag operation should complete within reasonable time
Bug #5 Regression - Race Conditions › should handle concurrent drag operations without crashes
Bug #5 Regression - Race Conditions › should have row-level locking implemented (FOR UPDATE NOWAIT)
Bug #5 Regression - Race Conditions › should use retry logic with exponential backoff
Bug #6 Regression - Loading States › should show loading overlay during drag operation
Bug #6 Regression - Loading States › should disable drag interactions during loading
Bug #6 Regression - Loading States › should show visual feedback (opacity, cursor) during loading
Bug #7 Regression - Auto-Cancel Logic › auto-cancel should NOT cancel today entries
Bug #7 Regression - Auto-Cancel Logic › auto-cancel SHOULD cancel past date entries
Bug #7 Regression - Auto-Cancel Logic › auto-cancel cron should be configured for 00:01 daily
Bug #8 Regression - Position Validation › should validate position range [1, maxPosition]
Bug #8 Regression - Position Validation › should show user-friendly error messages
Bug #8 Regression - Position Validation › should validate newPosition is a number
Bug #9 Regression - Nullable Constraints › RESERVED status should require queue fields
Bug #9 Regression - Nullable Constraints › PENDING/CONFIRMED status should NOT have queue fields
Bug #9 Regression - Nullable Constraints › unique constraint for (date, position) should be enforced
Bug #9 Regression - Nullable Constraints › queue fields should be nullable in schema
All Bugs - Final Verification › all bugfixes should be deployed and working
All Bugs - Final Verification › no console errors on critical pages
All Bugs - Final Verification › system should be stable for production deployment
